title: Seringia ovata
taxonomy: Seringia ovata is classified within the plant family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume family. This family comprises a vast array of flowering plants, including trees, shrubs, and herbaceous plants. As a member of the Fabaceae family, Seringia ovata is closely related to other legumes, such as beans and peas. The genus Seringia is a relatively small group of plants, with Seringia ovata being one of its species. Further classification within the plant kingdom places Seringia ovata within the kingdom Plantae.
